name: Raging Titan
short_description: Build your towers, plan your efforts, watch out for changing paths and strike back against the alien invaders in this challenging tower defense game!
detailed_description:
Raging Titan is a tower defense game in which you must defend your headquarters against waves of enemies rushing towards you. Build your towers, plan your efforts, watch out for changing paths and strike back against the alien invaders!
Show your tactical genius, your military leadership and your strategic thinking in this demanding fight!



War has come to Earth! Evil forces are attacking cities all around the world in an effort to extinguish mankind. The best military commanders are needed to fight the threat and save the life on the planet!

You are their archetype. A tactical genius, a fighter without fear. Equipped with a sense for the situation and experience of years of battle. You are sent as the spearhead to stop the enemies. It is in your hands whether we will survive or be forgotten!


Plan your best strategy and prevent your enemies from reaching their goal by building your defense towers. Control the enemy paths, shape the path they take to attack your and destroy them with a selection of your weapons!




Select the best from a selection of 10 hugely different towers. Control the masses by forcing them down a certain path with your Machine Gun towers, use the Plasma or Rocket towers as the backbone of your defense, or fry your enemies with a deadly lighting strike. Find the best tower for the types of enemies you are expecting and upgrade them in 3 different stages!




Shields, armor, airborne, walking, big and small - there are many enemies and each of them require a special tactic and counter measure to defeat them. Battle the robot infantry and face their bosses until the final command raider takes the battle into its own claws to bring down your Command HQ!




From fertile grasslands to the desert, from volcanic fissure to abandoned cities and from frozen mountain peaks to once beautiful beaches - fight the battle in 25 levels and diverse landscapes!
